data.title: Write failing unit tests for check_cycle_at_level()
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write failing unit tests for the new check_cycle_at_level(source_id, target_id, level, tracker_dir) function in ticket-graph.py. Tests must fail (RED) before the function is implemented.

## Implementation Steps
1. In tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py, add test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle() covering:
   - Given: synthetic tracker with epic-B having a depends_on link to epic-A (B→A exists). When: check_cycle_at_level("epic-A", "epic-B", "epic", tracker_dir). Then: returns True (adding A→B would create cycle A→B→A).
   - Given: single epic-A. When: check_cycle_at_level("epic-A", "epic-A", "epic", tracker_dir). Then: returns True (self-loop).
   - Given: ticket with ticket_type="Epic" (capital E). When: check_cycle_at_level called with level="epic". Then: returns True (case-insensitive matching includes the ticket).
   - Given: two epics with no cycle. When: check_cycle_at_level called. Then: returns False (no false positive).
2. Update .test-index to add RED marker: append [test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle] to the plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py line (or create new entry if absent).
   Format: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py: tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py [test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle]

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)
Given a synthetic .tickets-tracker/ directory with two epic tickets where epic-B has a depends_on link to epic-A,
When check_cycle_at_level("epic-A", "epic-B", "epic", tracker_dir) is called,
Then the function returns True (cycle detected — adding epic-A→epic-B would close the loop).

## Files
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py (modify — add test functions)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after RED marker is in .test-index
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test function test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle exists in test_ticket_graph.py
  Verify: grep -q "def test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle" tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] Running the new test returns non-zero (RED) before check_cycle_at_level() is implemented
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle -x 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR\|NameError\|AttributeError"
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker [test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle] for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
  Verify: grep "\[test_check_cycle_at_level_detects_cycle\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
